phase_0_verification.head_message: P188-P191: reconcile replay DB and post-migration governance

current_state_summary.p192_push_result: REJECTED — GH006 branch protection + large binary

p196_execution_plan.summary: P196 will rewrite the P191 local commit to exclude DB binaries, create a manifest, update .gitignore, and recommit. No push in P196. No DB deletion.
p196_execution_plan.authorization_phrase_required: YES execute P196 remove DB binaries from local commit using soft reset and recommit non-binary files, no push
pre_execution_checklist: C-01: Confirm no staged files (git diff --cached --name-only = empty)
C-03: Export staged-file inventory: git show --name-only HEAD > /tmp/p191_committed_files.txt
C-04: Compute SHA256 of production DB: shasum -a 256 lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db → must match a5ac27a6...
C-05: Compute SHA256 of backup: shasum -a 256 backups/p188_lottery_v2_backup_20260601_153821.db → must match 5eea5313...
C-06: Confirm DB rows: sqlite3 lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db 'SELECT COUNT(*)...' = 94924
C-07: Confirm backup rows: sqlite3 backups/p188_lottery_v2_backup_20260601_153821.db 'SELECT COUNT(*)...' = 54462
C-08: Run full test suite — must be 933+ PASS, 0 FAIL
C-09: Run drift guard — must be PASS
C-10: Confirm repo is /Users/kelvin/Kelvin-WorkSpace/LotteryNew, branch = main

step_1_preserve_evidence.action: Create DB migration manifest JSON before any git operation
step_1_preserve_evidence.purpose: Preserve verifiable DB metadata as git-tracked text, replacing binary
step_1_preserve_evidence.note: This file must be created BEFORE the reset so it can be staged in the recommit

step_2_soft_reset.action: Undo P191 commit while keeping all staged files intact
what_it_does: Moves HEAD pointer back to d1a6817 (P128 commit)
All 109 files from P191 remain in the staging area (index)
Local disk files are NOT touched — production DB stays at 94924 rows
step_2_soft_reset.safety: SAFE — only moves HEAD pointer; no file deletion
step_2_soft_reset.must_not: Never use git reset --hard (deletes unstaged changes)

step_3_unstage_db_binaries.action: Remove DB binary blobs from the staging area (index)
what_it_does: Removes these two paths from the git index (staged set)
Local disk files remain completely intact — NOT deleted
verify_after: git diff --cached --name-only | grep 'lottery_v2.db' → must be EMPTY
git diff --cached --name-only | grep 'p188_lottery_v2_backup_20260601_153821.db$' → must be EMPTY
ls -lh lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db → must still exist at ~96MB

step_4_update_gitignore.action: Append DB paths to .gitignore to prevent future accidental commits
lines_to_append: # SQLite production DB — managed locally, not tracked in git
# DB backups — stored locally, not tracked in git
step_4_update_gitignore.command: Append lines above to .gitignore using a safe write (not overwrite existing .gitignore)

step_5_stage_manifest.purpose: Include lightweight text evidence of DB migration in the commit

step_6_verify_staged_set.action: Confirm staged set is binary-free before committing
commands: wc -l /tmp/p196_staged_list.txt → should be ~108 (original 109 minus 2 DB binaries + .gitignore + manifest)

step_7_recommit.action: Create new local commit without DB binaries
step_7_recommit.command: git commit -m 'P182-P191: reconcile replay governance (no DB binaries)'
full_body: Backport P161-P181 code/docs/tests parity, reconcile replay DB migration
evidence (manifest + sha256 only; DB binaries excluded from git history),
update drift guard and stale tests, add P189-P195 governance artifacts.
No controlled_apply. POWER_LOTTO research remains closed.
Production DB: 94924 rows, bet_index PRESENT (local only, not in git)
Backup DB: 54462 rows, sha256 in backups/p188_*.db.sha256 (local only)
step_7_recommit.note: This creates a NEW commit hash — the P191 binary-heavy commit is replaced locally. No force push to origin/main.

step_8_post_commit_verification.action: Verify all safety conditions after recommit
checks: git log -1 --oneline → new commit hash, new message
git show HEAD --name-only | grep '\.db$' → must be EMPTY (no DB binary in new commit)
git diff --cached --name-only → must be EMPTY (nothing staged)
uv run python scripts/replay_lifecycle_drift_guard.py → must be PASS
git diff HEAD origin/main --name-only | grep '\.db$' → should not show DB (not on remote)

step_9_no_push.action: Stop — do NOT push in P196
step_9_no_push.reason: Push requires: (1) verify new commit is push-safe, (2) branch protection requires PR+CI, (3) separate P197 authorization
step_9_no_push.next: After P196 completes, P197 creates a feature branch and opens a PR

before_reset: S-01: no staged files — git diff --cached --name-only = empty
S-03: export file inventory — git show --name-only HEAD
after_unstage: S-11: lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db NOT in staged set
S-13: lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db still exists on disk (ls -lh shows ~96MB)
after_commit: S-16: no DB binary in new commit — git show HEAD --name-only | grep '.db$' = empty
S-18: production DB still has 94924 rows
S-24: backups/p188_lottery_v2_backup_20260601_153821.db.sha256 IS in new commit (kept as evidence)

manifest_design.purpose: Text-based evidence of P188 DB migration. Replaces binary blobs in git history. Auditors can verify migration by running local DB queries against these values.

production_db.note: NOT tracked in git — local only. Add path to .gitignore.

backup_db.note: NOT tracked in git — local only. Add path to .gitignore.
backup_db.note_2: Pre-migration backup. Rollback reference. Keep locally until migration is fully validated.

p188_sql_log.note: SQL log of P188 migration steps — tracked in git as text evidence

content.external_storage_note: DB binaries are intentionally excluded from git. Store production DB and backup on local disk, secure backup, or data management system outside git. Do NOT delete local copies until external backup is confirmed.

cto_recommendation.primary: Execute P196 soft-reset + recommit non-binary files, no push
cto_recommendation.execution_phrase: YES execute P196 remove DB binaries from local commit using soft reset and recommit non-binary files, no push
rationale: git reset --soft HEAD~1 is a well-understood, reversible local operation
It undoes only the P191 commit — local disk files (DB, backup) are untouched
Unstaging the two DB binary paths is explicit and auditable
The resulting commit is push-safe: research artifacts, tests, scripts, docs — all text
The manifest provides verifiable DB evidence without binary overhead
cto_recommendation.after_p196: P197 creates a feature branch from the new clean commit, pushes it, opens a PR, waits for replay-default-validation CI, then merges
critical_do_not: Do NOT run git reset --hard (destroys unstaged changes)
Do NOT run git rm lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db (deletes local file)
Do NOT push the current binary-heavy P191 commit
Do NOT delete the production DB or backup locally
